zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell於1141年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親William Bardolf16歲，母親Amabilia De Lindsay12歲。他於1166年之前與Rose de Hanselyn結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell于1141年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其时，他的父亲William Bardolf16岁，母亲Amabilia De Lindsay12岁。他于1166年之前与Rose de Hanselyn结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell was born in 1141, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bardolf, was 16 and his mother, Amabilia De Lindsay, was 12. He married Rose de Hanselyn before 1166. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell est né en 1141, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bardolf, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Amabilia De Lindsay, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Rose de Hanselyn avant 1166. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell 1141 in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bardolf 16 und seine Mutter Amabilia De Lindsay 12. Er hat vor 1166 Rose de Hanselyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell è nato il nel 1141 nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bardolf, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Amabilia De Lindsay, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Rose de Hanselyn prima del 1166. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewellが1141年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父William Bardolfは16歳，母Amabilia De Lindsayは12歳であった。1166年以前にRose de Hanselynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell(이)가 1141년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bardolf(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabilia De Lindsay(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1166년 이전 Rose de Hanselyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell nasceu em 1141, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bardolf, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Amabilia De Lindsay, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose de Hanselyn antes 1166. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell родился в 1141 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bardolf было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabilia De Lindsay, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose de Hanselyn перед 1166 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell nació en 1141, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bardolf, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Amabilia De Lindsay, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Rose de Hanselyn antes de 1166. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
